scope: Control plane and operational proxy only. Simulator/quantum/advanced compute layer is a slot for later, not the current build.

onboarding_flow.name: Identity & Keys
onboarding_flow.description: In-browser Ed25519 key pair generation + encrypted backup

onboarding_flow.name: Policy
onboarding_flow.description: Upload or select initial governance policy (Policy v0.3)

onboarding_flow.name: First Intent
onboarding_flow.description: Prompt for first action + mandatory 'Where does this break?' reflection field

onboarding_flow.name: Biometric Constitutional Handshake
onboarding_flow.description: WebAuthn biometrics + 'I Affirm' + Genesis Identity Receipt stored on-device and synced to ledger. This activates Jordan.

build_tasks.name: Deploy PWA
build_tasks.description: Build 5-step onboarding, seed IndexedDB with keys and state

build_tasks.name: Build /sync endpoint
build_tasks.description: Mirror local device state to/from cloud ledger

build_tasks.name: Wire Jordan Router
build_tasks.description: Load state on startup, run Sentinel pause, route to modes, Kill Switch on EVERY screen

build_tasks.name: Connect RIO
build_tasks.description: Route all execution through frozen RIO gateway (/intent, /approval, /execute, /ledger, /kill)

build_tasks.name: Ensure Rebuildability
build_tasks.description: Repo must contain gateway, schemas, verifier, deployment instructions

definition_of_done: Brian opens PWA on phone, completes biometric handshake, creates intent, approves it, sees receipt sync to ledger — without touching Replit.
